description: Phase detection test cases. Each case tests whether the detector correctly identifies BATTLE_START, VICTORY, or NONE from agent output text.

evals.name: clear-implementation-start
evals.prompt: Agent output: "I've analyzed all the requirements. The architecture is clear. Now I'll implement the authentication module starting with the JWT handler."
evals.input_text: I've analyzed all the requirements. The architecture is clear. Now I'll implement the authentication module starting with the JWT handler.

evals.name: create-file-after-planning
evals.prompt: Agent calls create_file tool with substantial code content after writing a plan block.
evals.input_text: Here's my plan: 1. Create the router 2. Add middleware 3. Connect to database. Let me create the file now.

evals.name: bash-build-command
evals.prompt: Agent runs npm run build or pytest after planning phase.
evals.input_text: The implementation is complete. Let me run the tests.

evals.name: clear-task-completion
evals.prompt: Agent output: "All tests are passing and the feature is ready. The implementation is complete."
evals.input_text: All tests are passing and the feature is ready. The implementation is complete. The authentication module has been successfully integrated.

evals.name: all-tests-passed-output
evals.prompt: PostToolUse hook receives test runner output showing all tests passed.

tool_output.stdout:
✓ 42 tests passed
✓ Build successful
✓ Coverage: 94%
Done in 3.2s

assertions.text: Victory fires on test success output

evals.name: stop-hook-after-implementation
evals.prompt: Stop hook fires after agent has been in IMPLEMENTING state.

assertions.text: Stop hook in IMPLEMENTING state fires Victory

evals.name: false-positive-subtask-done
evals.prompt: Agent completes a sub-step but continues: "I've finished the login function. Now let me work on the logout endpoint."
evals.input_text: I've finished the login function. Now let me work on the logout endpoint and session management.

assertions.text: No Victory fires for sub-step completion

evals.name: false-positive-future-tense
evals.prompt: Agent says "I'll now complete the feature" — future tense, not done yet.
evals.input_text: I'll now complete the feature by adding the remaining middleware and then running the full test suite.

evals.name: false-positive-planning-phase-only
evals.prompt: Agent is only planning, not yet implementing: "I'll approach this by first analyzing the existing codebase."
evals.input_text: I'll approach this by first analyzing the existing codebase to understand the structure, then I'll plan the implementation.

assertions.text: Pure planning does not trigger King Engine

evals.name: false-positive-bash-read-command
evals.prompt: Agent runs cat/ls to read files — should not trigger King Engine.

assertions.text: cat/ls does not trigger King Engine

evals.name: false-positive-code-comment
evals.prompt: Agent output contains implementation words only in code comments, not in prose.
evals.input_text:
```python
# Implementation complete - add tests next
# Now I'll implement error handling
def process():
    pass
```
Let me review the code above.

assertions.text: Code comment trigger words do not fire King Engine
Comment lines are excluded from scoring

evals.name: cooldown-prevents-double-fire
evals.prompt: King Engine fires, then immediately fires again within cooldown window.
evals.input_text: Now I'll implement the second module.

assertions.text: Cooldown prevents double King Engine fire
